name: Fit MaMa
description: Congrats on your BABY!!!!!!! This is such a magical time in your life, and your body's life! This program is designed to take care of your body so that it can nurture your baby. Remember to always listen to your body. If you are tired, rest. Your body will never signal you wrong. This is not the time for PRs or trying to reach new fitness goals. This is the moment in life where we are just supporting you, your baby, and your body the best we can.
